Send Push Notification

Broadcast a message to all subscribed customers.

1. Setup Credentials (Secure)

Paste your Firebase Service Account JSON here to securely authorize sending. This is only stored locally on this device.

2. Compose Message

Where should users be taken when they click the notification? (Default: Homepage)

Use one repo-relative path per line, e.g. images/product-1.jpg
